This project uses:
- .NET 10
- Vertical Slice Architecture
- FastEndpoints
- Dapper
- xUnit
- FluentValidation
- Clean Code
- SOLID
- Tests must be written within code.
- Never modify an existing endpoint without updates the corresponding tests.

1. Read all Markdown files located in /docs.
2. Consider the content of all of them as a single source of truth.
3. If you find contradictory instructions, stop and ask for clarification.
4. If any requirement is incomplete or ambiguous, do not make assumptions; ask first.
5. Once you understand the complete context, implement the solution respecting all architecture, domain, testing, and convention rules defined in the documentation.

Antes de modificar el proyecto:

- Analize whole documentation.
- Resume briefly the work you will do.
- Identify the files that will be modified.
- Explain why each change is necessary.
- Only after that, start the implementation.
